name: C2xGetLastErrorText
title: C2xGetLastErrorText
syntax: long C2xGetLastErrorText( dword bufferSize, char[] buffer );
description: Gets the error code description of the last called C2x... function.

parameters.name: bufferSize
parameters.description: Size of buffer in which the description text is copied

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: Buffer in which the description text is copied

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
